testcase.name: lookupBarcode emits BarcodeResult found=false isError=true and sets Error state on network failure
lookupBarcode emits BarcodeResult found=false isError=false when product not in database
saveEntry creates log entry and emits event
selectFood stores food and returns false when complete
applyMissingValues updates selected food
saveApiKey ignores blank key
events Channel delivers EntrySaved to exactly one collector
selectRecipe stores recipe and sets recipe source
getIngredientData returns ingredient data for selected food with weight
setWeight computes scaled nutrition for recipe
ingredientMode defaults to false
setIngredientMode updates ingredientMode in uiState
searchUsda with empty results sets NoResults state
lookupBarcode emits BarcodeResult found=true isError=false on successful lookup
resetState clears all state and resets ingredientMode
setWeight with invalid value clears scaled nutrition
searchUsda with error sets Error state
getIngredientData returns null when no food selected
selectFood returns true when food has missing values
saveApiKey stores key and updates hasUsdaKey state
searchUsda updates state with results
initial state has empty search and no USDA key
getIngredientData converts recipe to per-100g equivalent
setWeight computes scaled nutrition for food
